{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206004477CD149AA5D48A98D205"}"},"total":651},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7255354858310583055","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看真的好看，坑挖的很大，填坑也非常的干净，剧情跌宕起伏， 半天看到了112章，虽然离新更新的比较远，但是我就想说能不能快一点的更新"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689269127,"group_id":"7215854611880479747","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9wQ276+WAgRXQSCtIaQFs0ctPDvJBH7WPoMLw5bEUHX","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2256655796939968","user_name":".强手裂颅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2256655796939968","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7215854611880479747","book_info":{"abstract":"直播+钓鱼+单女主+搞笑+日常休闲。（非爽文）
钓鱼佬高小凡获得了一个钓鱼系统，完成任务就可以获得奖励。
“请在规定时间内作钓，中途放弃将没有奖励。”
一切都很正常，直到高小凡拉上来一具尸体。
直播间里的观众震惊了！！！
“卧槽，那特么是尸体吧，主播赶紧跑吧！”
“主播不用担心，已报警。”
“主播怎么还在钓？给主播跪了！”
.........
夜钓尸体，小主播一夜震惊钓鱼圈。
路亚怪鱼，新手套装狂拉米级巨物。
参加综艺，危难中寒江孤影成绝唱。
全国游钓，游山玩水结识全国钓友。
王者之战，黑马之姿以下克上夺冠。
携美出海，手竿博巨物书写着传奇。
